summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Absolute Select Value ETF (ABEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of US stocks seeking positive absolute returns. ABEQ was launched on Jan 22, 2020 and is issued by Absolute.

holdings.infoBox: ABEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are Berkshire Hathaway stock at 10.70%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 8.45%, U.S. Treasury Security Stripped Interest Security 0% at 8.39%, Loews at 7.66%, and Unilever at 6.53%.
